evals.prompt: I'm on Scandit SDK v6 and need to migrate my SparkScan Flutter integration to v7. Here's my scanner file: ScannerPage_v6.dart
evals.expected_output: The skill reads migration.md, applies the 6→7 property renames and removes deprecated properties in ScannerPage_v6.dart, and summarizes all changes made.

assertions.text: torchControlVisible is present in the output file
torchButtonVisible is NOT present in the output file
triggerButtonTintColor is present in the output file
captureButtonTintColor is NOT present in the output file
captureButtonBackgroundColor is NOT present in the output file
At least one of triggerButtonCollapsedColor, triggerButtonExpandedColor, triggerButtonAnimationColor is present if the input set a trigger background color
barcodeFindButtonVisible is present in the output file
fastFindButtonVisible is NOT present in the output file

Removed v6 properties (handModeButtonVisible, soundModeButtonVisible, hapticModeButtonVisible, shouldShowScanAreaGuides, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor, stopCapturingText, startCapturingText, resumeCapturingText, scanningCapturingText, brush) are NOT present
A summary.md file is present describing changes

evals.prompt: We're upgrading our Flutter app from Scandit SDK 7 to 8. Here's our SparkScan code: ScannerPage_v7.dart. Please apply any necessary changes.
evals.expected_output: The skill applies the v7→v8 changes (SparkScan.withSettings → SparkScan(settings: ...), any ExtendedSparkScanViewUiListener rename) and summarizes the changes. DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey is left as-is because it's still valid in v8 Flutter.

assertions.text: SparkScan(settings: is present in the output file
SparkScan.withSettings( is NOT present in the output file
DataCaptureContext.forLicenseKey( is preserved OR converted to DataCaptureContext.initialize — both are acceptable on Flutter
A summary.md is present listing the changes
Summary mentions flutter pub get must be run after the package version bump
The output file is functionally equivalent to the input otherwise — no unnecessary changes

evals.prompt: We need to upgrade our SparkScan integration from SDK 6 all the way to v8. Here's our current code: ScannerPage_v6.dart
evals.expected_output: The skill applies both migrations in order (6→7 then 7→8) and summarizes all changes organized by migration step.

assertions.text: torchControlVisible is present (6→7 rename applied)
torchButtonVisible is NOT present
barcodeFindButtonVisible is present (6→7 rename applied)
fastFindButtonVisible is NOT present
SparkScan(settings: is present (7→8 constructor form applied)
SparkScan.withSettings( is NOT present
SparkScan.forSettings( is NOT present
Removed v6 properties (handModeButtonVisible, soundModeButtonVisible, hapticModeButtonVisible, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor, brush) are NOT present
Summary covers both migration steps (references both 6→7 and 7→8)

evals.prompt: I want to upgrade my SparkScan to the latest Scandit SDK version. Here's my code and pubspec.yaml.
evals.expected_output: The skill reads pubspec.yaml to detect v6.28.x, determines the target is v8, applies both migrations without asking the user for their version.

assertions.text: Summary mentions the detected version (6.28.x or v6)
Summary mentions the pubspec.yaml dependency versions need to be bumped to ^8.0.0
Summary mentions flutter pub get must be run after the bump
torchControlVisible is present (6→7 rename applied)
torchButtonVisible is NOT present
SparkScan(settings: is present (7→8 constructor form applied)
Removed v6 properties (handModeButtonVisible, soundModeButtonVisible, hapticModeButtonVisible, captureButtonActiveBackgroundColor, brush) are NOT present
Did not ask the user for their version — proceeded autonomously
